Required Permissions

outputs.description: The ADOM on which the installation occurred. FortiManager.Installation.end_tm The installation task end time.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.adom

outputs.description: The installation_task_flags. FortiManager.Installation.id The installation task ID.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.flags

outputs.description: The installation status details. FortiManager.Installation.line.end_tm The installation task end time.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.line.detail

outputs.description: The installation error. FortiManager.Installation.line.history Installation task historical details.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.line.err

outputs.description: The installation IP. FortiManager.Installation.line.name The installation name.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.line.ip

outputs.description: The installation task oid. FortiManager.Installation.line.percent The installation task completion percent.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.line.oid

outputs.description: The installation task start time. FortiManager.Installation.line.state The installation task state.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.line.start_tm

outputs.description: The VDOM on which the installation occurred. FortiManager.Installation.num_done The number of done tasks.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.line.vdom

outputs.description: The number of errors found. FortiManager.Installation.num_lines The number of installation data lines.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.num_err

outputs.description: The number of warnings found. FortiManager.Installation.percent The installation task completion percent.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.num_warn

outputs.description: The installation task PID. FortiManager.Installation.src The installation task source
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.pid

outputs.description: The installation task start time. FortiManager.Installation.state The installation task state.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.start_tm

outputs.description: The installation task title. FortiManager.Installation.tot_percent The installation task completion percent.
outputs.name: FortiManager.Installation.title
